title: YOUNGLIVES - 211info
text: YOUNG LIFE YOUNGLIVES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Christian-based mentoring program where mentors accompany teens to parenting classes, offer club meetings and groups on Bible study, group outings and life skill instruction. Also offers a six-day camp with child care is included. Eligibility: Expectant or current mothers ages 14-19 Hours: Varies by event Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Camps * Teenage Parents Mentoring Programs * Teenage Parents Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUNG LIFE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
